07/14/26NW-C3716 - Bowman Bay Pier Demolition at Deception Pass State Park
Ref #: NW-C3716 		Jason Bologna

 The work for this project includes removing the existing timber pier, including all guardrails, decking, stringers, bracing, pile caps, and piles in full compliance with the Environmental Permits of Bowman Bay Pier in Deception Pass State Park. Major items included in the base bid (but not limited to) are: 1. Marine Mammal Monitoring 2. Pier Removal 3. Concrete Debris Removal 4. Reimbursement for Protected Species Monitoring Suspension
Deadline for Submitting Questions: 06/30/26
Includes an Inclusion Plan: N
Additional Data
07/14/26Sole Source Posting for Brighton Training Group CACFP training platform
Ref #: 20260528 		Brenda Merritt

 OSPI is contemplating awarding a contract to Brighton Training Group for a training platform for CNS CACFP sponsors to access. Includes Bright Track licensing fee for hosting, maintenance, and help desk support for 3,000 end users and access to 29 interactive training modules specific to operation of the USDA's Child Nutrition Programs that meet federal CNP requirements.
Includes an Inclusion Plan: N

07/15/26BHHA Lab Directorships
Ref #: 2534-880 		Nicole Kahle

 The behavioral health and habilitation administration (BHHA) of DSHS seeks to procure qualified laboratory director services for its state-operated behavioral health facilities. These services will support regulatory compliance, clinical oversight, and laboratory operations in accordance with applicable federal and state requirements. The facilities in this solicitation are Eastern State Hospital (ESH) and Western State Hospital (WSH)

Deadline for Submitting Questions: 06/09/26
Includes an Inclusion Plan: Y

07/17/26Nutritionals and Supplements
Ref #: 02926 		Davis Abbott

 This new contract is for nutritional and dietary food products and dietary supplements, including products such as powdered and liquid formulas for essential and non-essential nutrients, vitamins and minerals, and dietary management. Many of these products are specifically designed for newborns, elderly, or people who may have deficiencies in vitamins, proteins, or other nutrients due to medical conditions, or people who have medical conditions that require enteral feeding.
Includes an Inclusion Plan: N

Ref #: FDMG-06-2026 		Latojanae Hull
06/18/26
 The Washington State Department of Commerce is soliciting proposals to support Washington communities in preparing for and capitalizing on the significant tourism and economic development opportunities associated with the 2026 FIFA World Cup. 07/20/26Fleet Card Products and Services
Ref #: 26-00009 		Kirsten Taylor
07/02/26
 PLEASE NOTE: This RFP was originally posted on May 14, 2026, and this is a repost of the same solicitation. WDFW is seeking bids for fleet card products and services for purchasing fuel, maintenance, and roadside assistance. Fuel purchases may include gasoline, diesel, biodiesel, marine, aviation, and propane. The fleet card may also be used for electric vehicle charging stations.

Deadline for Submitting Questions: 06/10/26

07/20/26Steam Turbine Generator Rebuild
Ref #: RFQQ 8777784-TD 		Patricia Olsen Demarest

 The University of Washington (“University” or “UW”) is soliciting quotes and qualifications from qualified contractors to provide maintenance, inspection, repair support, reassembly, alignment, and related services for the TG-3 steam turbine rebuild following a forced outage event. The unit is located at the University of Washington Power Plant in Seattle, Washington
Includes an Inclusion Plan: N
